---
title: "General Descriptives"
subtitle: "Individual, behavioural, and environmental determinants of personal light exposure in daily life: a multi-country wearable and experience-sampling study"
author: "Johannes Zauner"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
    code-link: true
    page-layout: full
---

## Preface

This document contains general descriptive plots and tables of the dataset.

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| filename: Setup
library(tidyverse)
library(melidosData)
library(LightLogR)
library(gt)
library(glue)
library(here)
library(rlang)
library(gtsummary)
source("helpers.R")
source("table.R")
```

## Load data

```{r}
load(here("data/tbl1_data.RData"))
```

## Table generation

```{r}
general_table_all(tbl1_data)
```


```{r}

```

```{r}

gtsave(tbl1, "tables/tbl1.png", vwidth = 1200)
```
